hero.title: Appliances we know, repairs we stand behind
hero.subtitle: Khorshid is an official home-appliance distributor and specialist repair center with real warranties and doorstep service.
hero.video_caption: A look inside Khorshid's workshop and service team

steps.title: A service path you can actually follow
steps.subtitle: From order to installation, every step is visible — you always know where your appliance is.
steps.s1_title: Place an order or repair request
steps.s1_desc: Choose a product, or register your faulty appliance for inspection.
steps.s2_desc: A Khorshid specialist coordinates a time and reviews the device.
steps.s3_desc: The product is delivered to your door, or a technician comes to repair it.
steps.s4_desc: Every service comes with an official warranty and after-delivery support.

products_page.title: Khorshid Products
products_page.subtitle: Prices and stock are pulled live from the inventory system.
products_page.empty: No products to show right now.
products_page.error_desc: Make sure the backend (python app.py) is running and this page is opened from http://localhost:5000, not by opening the file directly.

auth.login_subtitle: Log in to track your orders and repairs.
auth.signup_subtitle: It's free and takes less than a minute.
auth.error_invalid: The information entered is not valid.

cart_page.title: Checkout & Shipping
cart_page.delivery_desc: Tap the map or drag the pin to set the exact delivery location.
cart_page.success_desc: Your invoice has been issued. Thank you for your order.
cart_page.select_location_first: Please set the delivery location on the map first.
cart_page.address_unavailable: Address not found; coordinates saved instead.
cart_page.max_stock_reached: You've reached the maximum stock for this product.
cart_page.insufficient_stock: Not enough stock; only {available} left of this product.
cart_page.login_required: Please log in to place your order.

footer.about: Since 2009, Khorshid has distributed and repaired quality home appliances for Iranian families.
footer.rights: All rights reserved to Khorshid Co.
